pattern: Pattern-D functional-equivalence (downstream-layer activation patching prior art)

honest_audit.borderline_notes: Velvet worm two-phase projectile defense maps to downstream activation patching + multi-stage adversarial trap (2603.21745, 2510.18103) — same artefact (downstream activation), same effect (immobilize adversarial signal at downstream location), different mechanism (liquid-to-solid phase change vs precomputed defense gradient). The two-phase trigger is the distinguishing micro-mechanism but the overall artefact/effect collision is sufficient to trigger functional-hit.
